# programs.home-manager

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.home-manager`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------- | --------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `programs.home-manager.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Home Manager. |
| `programs.home-manager.package` | `package (read only)` | The home-manager package. |
| `programs.home-manager.path` | `null or string` | The default path to use for Home Manager. When null , then the home-manager channel, $HOME/.config/nixpkgs/home-manager , and $HOME/.nixpkgs/home-manager will be attempted. |
